item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
makes more sense if you've seen house of the dragon
this happened to a high school friend
mini eggs are amazing
not all of us!
kind of hard to pick a favorite tbh
imagine what actual tropical places look like
it's wild out there these days
he's trying his best ok
loved this show
it's that easy?
again?
i'd like to see someone try to wield that
he said male massage was "out"
as is tradition
probably want to do this outside
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Progress
item.description: After almost 10 years together I left my husband almost 3 weeks ago. While starting over will be hard and things will be tight financially it's what's healthiest for me and my daughter. #single_life

item.title: Phone Clearing Dump 5 / ??
item.description:
They haunt me daily.
They look so happy!
Cowabunga, little dude!
My gf says she wants more letters after her name than in it. She's already surpassed her first name and is halfway through her last.
I went to put on a jacket eleven months ago, and my shoulder hasn't been the same since.

item.title: Fun With ceramics !
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/ceramicpapi?igsh=MWQ1ZGUxMzBkMA I love this guy's videos. Reminds me of my younger brother when he did all his art. We would make up stories and voices for them. I wish I had recorded lots of those dumb fun convos. But that's life. Its the memories we have. Edit: so he sells his ceramic but they sell fast. https://disruptedclay.com/?fbclid=PAY2xjawI0NclleHRuA2FlbQIxMQABpki4DyeevxxZs78UjBx3BjJdc2Romm6RlUse1K3ywulQOXGckQSYmUD0jw_aem_uKnzV0nta4Twtd4sqZpzvQ
item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: What Happened Today #32
item.description: Trump's chaotic playbook unfolds: tariff disturbances, bold territorial boasts, brutal layoffs, and million-dollar dinners while courts and dissenters push back. Spread the word. #resist #GovBriefToday LINKS 1 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/money/2025/03/04/trump-says-a-little-disturbance-from-tariffs/81499139007/ 2 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/trump-tells-congress-that-u-s-will-acquire-greenland-one-way-or-the-other/ar-AA1Agz9d 3 - https://www.nbcnews.com/nbc-out/out-news/judge-blocks-trump-order-funding-institutions-gender-affirming-care-rcna194800 4 - https://www.yahoo.com/news/us-tax-agency-weighs-firing-064752883.html 5 - https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trump-illegally-removed-member-board-protects-government-employees/story?id=119435326 6 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/04/trump-hegseth-pentagon-firings-civilian-harm/ 7 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqly0zrnnv3o 8 - https://apnews.com/article/census-bureau-commerce-department-howard-lutnick-3a56003b790aedce6e6c8ddd7c6b6943 9 - https://www.axios.com/2025/03/04/trump-maga-inc-fundraiser-cost 10 - https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/commerce-to-overhaul-internet-for-all-plan-expanding-starlink-funding-prospects-74664efc 11 - https://thehill.com/homenews/state-watch/5176568-dc-mayor-suggests-city-will-paint-over-black-lives-matter-plaza-near-white-house/ FIGHTING BACK - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/04/al-green-ejected-trump-address-00212734 Archive - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: I'll take any good news I can get.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
me and who?
we are dependent on each other mmk.
oh haiiii.
wait didnt I just post this. idk. so many memes. my brain is a blur. making good ground no cleaning out memes tho. think my comment last time was all my moans are a little sexual in nature.
ima be an octopus on your face. just you wait.
yea. overthinking overthinking is so much fun. lemme just escape into memes and games.
too soon.
I have both of those rn actually. need to restock soon.
this. absolutely. give me some gaming and random conversations and I am good. okies and maybe one other thing. wait. two. wait. three. wait. okies I dont know how many I got distracted by the maybe one other thing. you can guess. :p
it doesnt have to be a hoodie...
ugh. downloaded dis for him cause he liked these games. i dont. I am gud.
hehe.
I feel like theres another version with another panel.
I cant help it okay. they work so well.
mhmm.
le sigh. i will wait. I can wait. I can not be an attention whore *all of the time*... maybe.
memes. gaming. good company.
hmm idea for rice.
oh. i guess its 2025 now. still true.
pretty green. me as a cat. now assigned to you.
wait. shit. this is in the next post. my bad. guess itll be in both since prepping ones for the rest of the week.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "The weariest night, the longest day, sooner or later must perforce come to an end." -Baroness Orczy I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Transgirl Tuesday 27th
item.description:
Bruna Mendonça
Kissy Duerré
Kaleigh Coxx
Carolina Gutierrez
Venus Moores
KittieMercury
Olivia Zaidan
Domino Pressley
Zayraoff
Sarah Hills
Sarah again
Janet Mock Happy Tuesday friends, welcome to Transgirl Tuesday number 27. It feels uncomfortable to me that celebrating trans people is becoming more and more an act of resistance, and my heart goes out to you (and the whole LGBTQIA+ community). I hope for better days to come. @MadSovereignMary @dickblack12 @Shenaniganz80 @MermaidNinja @secretlyacd @deaddogsmuggler @JohnWickdidnothingwrong @Ngugi @OldBikerDude @Kevinbfree @applesugar @DaymanAhAAAAah @bdennis3222000 @SassySailor Let me know if you want to be added to the tag list
item.dc:creator: jonhamsandwich11

item.title: Body positivity
item.dc:creator: l0calh0st

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
This foundation was partially demolished to make way for utilities, compromising its structural integrity.
The support columns in this commercial building have sustained damage from forklifts crashing into them.
This damage is not just from one instance. I guess anyone can be forklift certified these days.
A knife shouldn’t be able to easily penetrate wood like this. If it does, it’s a clear indication of rot, decay, or possible termite damage, all of which can lead to major structural problems.
This block retaining wall is leaning because it wasn’t built to properly support the hillside, one issue being that it lacks proper drainage.
The interlocking system used here is common in older construction, but it’s not the most effective method for long-term stability.
Expansive clay soil expands when wet and shrinks as it dries, which can lead to deep cracks and fissures like this one. In this case, a hammer was able to fit into the fissure. That’s why moisture control in the crawlspace is so important to avoid bigger issues down the line.
Leaning Tower of Pisa who? Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: State Capitol @Minnesota March 4th
item.description: #50501 protest today in Minnesota. Great turnout.
item.dc:creator: IsHeSkiing

item.title: Violence will be increasingly used to silence dissent
item.description:
Non-violent protest and free speech is a constitutionally protect right
This is assault. This is beyond shameful
They smile and laugh at the actions of weak, juvenile brown-nosing sycophants.
Premeditated, physical assault on the right to free speech, actions taken by a civil servant.
Representative Lance Gooden - You can send three free faxes a day to his office: https://gooden.house.gov/about
If you’re going to protest, make sure you bring an American Flag and wave it loudly and proudly so that when they use live rounds on you the whole world will see who they are targeting.
item.dc:creator: TigerRaiders

item.title: city of angels
item.description: ICE relies on fear and misinformation, but the law is clear: they cannot enter without a signed warrant. People are taking action—informing their neighbors, recording encounters, and refusing to open the door. This isn’t just about one city. Communities everywhere can do the same. Know your rights. source: lulacorg on tt p.s. Immigrants are the lifeblood of every great nation: https://imgur.com/a/w98Xfz4
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull
